dns_explorer.application.service module¶

Module

service.py

Info

Service for orchestrating the tool execution process.

class dns_explorer.application.service.Service(dns_resolver: IDNSResolver | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: IService

Service for orchestrating the tool execution process.

It defines:

attributes:
_dns_resolver - Adapter for DNS resolution operations.
_SUBDOMAINS - List of _SUBDOMAINS to explore.
methods:
__init__ - Initializes the Service.
explore - Explores DNS _SUBDOMAINS.
check_dns - Executes dns request and reverse DNS lookup for a single domain.
get_records - Queries various DNS records for a domain.
reverse_resolve - Performs reverse DNS lookup on an IP address.
is_initialized - Checks if the service and its adapters are initialized.
_SUBDOMAINS: list[str] = ['www', 'mail', 'remote', 'blog', 'webmail', 'server', 'ns', 'smtp', 'pop', 'imap', 'admin', 'secure', 'vpn', 'dns', 'ftp', 'test', 'portal', 'host', 'support', 'dev', 'web', 'mx', 'email', 'cloud', 'owa', 'cdn', 'api', 'exchange', 'mysql', 'wiki', 'cpanel']¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
check_dns(domain: str, verbose: bool = False) → ResolvedDomain | None[source]¶

Executes dns request and reverse DNS lookup.

Parameters:

  • domain (<str>) – Domain name to check.

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option.

Returns:

ResolvedDomain instance or None.

Return type:

<ResolvedDomain | None>

Exceptions:

None.

explore(domain: str, cluster: int, verbose: bool = False) → list[ResolvedDomain][source]¶

Explores _SUBDOMAINS of a domain and resolves their DNS and reverse DNS.

Parameters:

  • domain (<str>) – Base domain name to explore.

  • cluster (<int>) – Number of _SUBDOMAINS in cluster to scan.

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose logging.

Returns:

List of resolved domains.

Return type:

<list[ResolvedDomain]>

Exceptions:
ValueError: domain must be provided.
get_records(domain: str) → list[DNSRecord][source]¶

Queries various DNS records for a domain.

Parameters:

domain (<str>) – Domain name.

Returns:

List of DNS records.

Return type:

<list[DNSRecord]>

Exceptions:
ValueError: domain must be provided.
is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if the service is initialized.

Returns:

True if the service is initialized, False otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

reverse_resolve(ip: str) → list[str][source]¶

Performs reverse DNS lookup on an IP address.

Parameters:

ip (<str>) – IP address.

Returns:

List of resolved hostnames.

Return type:

<list[str]>

Exceptions:
ValueError: ip must be provided.
